creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
(In reply to Craig Leres from comment #3)

> I think all of this is outside of the scope of devel/extensa-esp32-elf.

I think you're completely right in that subject. Anyway, it would be a nice to have having a more modern version of the extensa-esp32-elf toolchain, but I assume the existent toolchain would work with the code in question.

I'll close this PR.

Thank you very much fpr the hint towards devel/arduino-bsd-mk! I highly appreciate this port, it seems it is a good starting point although the target is non-ESP32.

Thank you very much.
